channel.title: Ecclesiology Podcast
channel.description: Reformed ecclesiology from à Brakel. Theological reflections on the church, Christ, and Christian witness.
channel.itunes:author: Jason Ruis

item.title: 01 — There Is No Christ Without His Church
item.description: Chapter 25 of Wilhelmus à Brakel's Reasonable Service. The necessity of the church for salvation: Christ has no members outside His body, no children apart from His mother the church. Exploring the two kingdoms, the church's role in the world, and true Christian witness.
item.itunes:author: Jason Ruis
